secciones.contenido: When you need lawn care or any landscaping services in Greenville SC, we've got your back. Our philosophy here at Cutting Edge Mowing & Water is to approach every project with a personalized, custom game plan. We understand that no two clients' yards are the same. Some homeowners like their yards cut a certain way, some business owners need specific weekly maintenance on their daylilies — we are bringing quality care to an industry that likes to focus on quantity. Offering high-quality lawn care, landscaping, and property pressure washing in the Upstate area. We are a holistic option for home and business owners and are able to take care of your property needs through all four seasons. From weed prevention to landscaping maintenance, our experienced team of lawn care professionals is ready to bring your vision to life. Learn why Cutting Edge Mowing & Water is the most dependable and honest landscaping company in Greenville, South Carolina. Contact us today for a free quote!
secciones.cta: Contact us today for a free quote!

secciones.contenido:
Michele D. — Taylors, SC: "We have used Cutting Edge for 2 years now and we couldn't be more happy with the service we get. Besides mowing, they take care of our pruning needs and mulching seasonal. Excellent at pruning also. A+ Recommendation."

Tina R. — Greenville: "Through out the years I have tried different lawn care companies and last year when I hired Cutting Edge Mowing and Washing they did an excellent job. The owner Ian Wright was supportive and made sure my yard always looked well maintained. Cutting Edge Mowing and Washing was flexible, at times my yard needed to have maintained a couple times a week and Mr. Wright always found a way to fit my property in and make it look top notch. I would highly recommend Cutting Edge Mowing and Washing as a Lawn Care company for the Greenville SC community."

Quez J. — Greenville: "Called Ian and not only did he respond but he completed the job the next day. The yard looked amazing, highly recommend."
Proudly Serving our neighbors in Greenville, Greer, Taylors, Easley, Fountain Inn, Simpsonville, Golden Strip, Mauldin, and other upstate areas.
